subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 240831A is not a GRB
body:
L. Scotton (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 746808894/240831621/240831A at 14:54:49.48 UT
on 31 August 2024 (GCN #37362), tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
